has_more.description: True when older messages exist; page with `latest` set to the oldest returned ts.

current_user_id.description: User ID of the connected account (from auth.test). Messages authored by this id are the requesting user's own. Absent when auth.test failed.

user.description: Raw Slack user ID of the author (e.g. U0123456789). Keep for follow-up calls; do not show to the user.

user_display_name.description: Human-readable author name resolved via users.info. Use this in user-facing output. Absent when resolution failed.

is_current_user.description: True when this message was written by the connected account — the requesting user's own words; attribute them to the requester. Absent when the connected identity is unknown.

reply_count.description: Number of thread replies under this message. The replies are NOT in history — fetch them with slack.get_thread_replies.

thread_ts.description: Present on thread parents and replies: the parent message's ts.
